name: salon-karola-app
description: Android wrapper for the Salon Karola App hosted on Render.

scripts.build: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const files = ['app.py', 'wsgi.py', 'salon_karola_legacy.py']; const isWin = process.platform === 'win32'; const cmd = isWin ? 'py' : 'python'; const args = isWin ? ['-3', '-m', 'py_compile', ...files] : ['-m', 'py_compile', ...files]; const result = spawnSync(cmd, args, { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(result.status || 0);"

author: Salon Karola
